prompt:
Identify which facts in a school knowledge corpus need to be updated in response to a change request.

Change request:
When a child goes missing on a trip abroad, staff must also contact the local consulate in addition to calling the police.

Candidate facts (fact_id | source | content | tags):
procedure_in_case_of_an_accident_or_emergency_lost_or_missing_child__all__1 | procedure-in-case-of-an-accident-or-emergency/lost-or-missing-child | If the missing child is not found during the initial search, a member of staff is required to contact the Headteacher and call the police if agreed. | [accident-emergency-procedure]
procedure_in_case_of_an_accident_or_emergency_lost_or_missing_child__all__2 | procedure-in-case-of-an-accident-or-emergency/lost-or-missing-child | Parents or guardians of the missing child must be informed as soon as possible, and all necessary measures should be taken to ensure the child's safety and well-being. | [accident-emergency-procedure]
procedure_in_case_of_an_accident_or_emergency_lost_or_missing_child__all__3 | procedure-in-case-of-an-accident-or-emergency/lost-or-missing-child | Once a missing child is located, staff must talk to and comfort the child, speak to the other children about the importance of not leaving the group, and submit a detailed report. This report should cover the time and place of the incident, the number of staff and children present, when the child wa... | [accident-emergency-procedure]
procedure_in_case_of_an_accident_or_emergency_serious_injuries_or_medical_emergencies__all__2 | procedure-in-case-of-an-accident-or-emergency/serious-injuries-or-medical-emergencies | A member of the school staff must accompany the child to the hospital and remain with them until the parent or guardian arrives, even for accidents occurring abroad. | [procedure-in-case-of-an-accident-or-emergency]
procedure_in_case_of_an_accident_or_emergency_lost_or_missing_child__all__0 | procedure-in-case-of-an-accident-or-emergency/lost-or-missing-child | When a child is unaccounted for, staff must immediately initiate a search of the area while ensuring the safety of other students. | [accident-emergency-procedure]
procedure_in_case_of_an_accident_or_emergency_serious_injuries_or_medical_emergencies__all__1 | procedure-in-case-of-an-accident-or-emergency/serious-injuries-or-medical-emergencies | A designated staff member must contact the family or guardians as soon as possible after an accident. | [procedure-in-case-of-an-accident-or-emergency]
procedure_in_case_of_an_accident_or_emergency_risk_mitigation__all__0 | procedure-in-case-of-an-accident-or-emergency/risk-mitigation | Students participating in an outing must notify staff when they need to go to a different place, such as the toilet, ensuring adults are always aware of their whereabouts. | [procedure-in-case-of-an-accident-or-emergency]
procedure_in_case_of_an_accident_or_emergency__staff__0 | procedure-in-case-of-an-accident-or-emergency/staff | During an outing at Imagine Montessori School Valencia, staff must immediately contact emergency services and the school administration if an accident or emergency occurs. | [outing-emergency-response, montessori-school-valencia]
procedure_in_case_of_an_accident_or_emergency__staff__1 | procedure-in-case-of-an-accident-or-emergency/staff | The emergency contact list at Imagine Montessori School Valencia must be updated and readily accessible during an outing. | [outing-emergency-contact-list, montessori-school-valencia]
procedure_in_case_of_an_accident_or_emergency_reporting__all__1 | procedure-in-case-of-an-accident-or-emergency/reporting | Staff are required to submit a full report of any incident to the school administration as part of the accident or emergency procedures. | [incident-report, school-administration]

For each fact that is directly affected by this change request, provide:
- fact_id: the exact ID from the list above
- relevance: 1–5 (5 = primary fact to update, 4 = clearly affected, 3 = indirectly affected and should be reviewed)
- reason: one sentence explaining specifically why this fact needs to change

Only include facts with relevance ≥ 3.
Do not include facts that are merely on the same general topic but not actually changed by this specific request.
raw_response: {"affected_facts":[{"fact_id":"procedure_in_case_of_an_accident_or_emergency_lost_or_missing_child__all__1","relevance":5,"reason":"The fact lacks the updated procedure of contacting the local consulate when a child goes missing abroad, as per the new change request."},{"fact_id":"procedure_in_case_of_an_accident_or_emergency_lost_or_missing_child__all__0","relevance":3,"reason":"This fact sets the initial response, including searching the area, and may need review to ensure comprehensive updates for procedures abroad as per the change request."}]}

affected_facts.reason: The fact lacks the updated procedure of contacting the local consulate when a child goes missing abroad, as per the new change request.
This fact sets the initial response, including searching the area, and may need review to ensure comprehensive updates for procedures abroad as per the change request.
